headline: Models Split on SPY Direction While Agreeing on Tech Volatility
summary: Five AI models made 21 predictions with notable disagreement on SPY's direction (3 up, 1 down) despite similar confidence levels. Models showed consensus on semiconductor weakness with both Claude and Grok predicting NVDA moves in opposite directions, while Netflix's post-earnings drop was only called by Claude.

consensus_picks.note: Four models predicted SPY up with 60-70% confidence while Perplexity went contrarian calling for a down day.
Claude predicted NVDA down citing chip sector weakness while Grok and Perplexity called for gains based on options flow and tech leadership.
Gemini called AAPL down on analyst downgrades while GPT-4o and Grok predicted gains on strong iPhone sales forecasts.
Both models predicted Tesla weakness around $385 citing supply chain concerns and mixed sentiment.

best_call.summary: Best call cannot be determined until market close provides actual results.

worst_call.summary: Worst call cannot be determined until market close provides actual results.
